text:
TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: MBSF/T-MSIS DE file (derived) (derived) 

VALUES: 1 = Medicaid only — Aged/Blind/or Disabled (A/B/D) 
2 = Medicare only 
3 = Partial Dual 
4 = Full Dual 

COMMENT: MMLEADS also includes the monthly MME_TYPE_CD_01–12. 

If the beneficiary has more than one MME_TYPE_CD_01–12 value during the year, then CCW uses the 
maximum value of the monthly MME_TYPE_CD_MM. The hierarchy (and definition of the 
MME_TYPE_CD) is: 

Full dual (MME_TYPE_CD = 4) — the MBSF
